nasb.text: You have heard the blasphemy; how does it seem to you?” And they all condemned Him to be deserving of death.

esv.text: You have heard his blasphemy. What is your decision?” And they all condemned him as deserving death.

cnv.text: 你們都聽見這褻瀆的話了。你們認為怎麼樣？”眾人都定他該死的罪。

ccb.text: 你们听见祂说亵渎的话了，你们看怎么办？”他们都判祂死罪。

csbs.text: 你们都听见了这亵渎的话。你们怎么看？” 他们都判定他是该死的。
